hr.intro: HR anomaly detection uses the same engine as HR → Anomalies. Results are read-only suggestions.

reorder.title: Purchase reorder advisor
reorder.subtitle: Velocity, stock, and lead-time assumptions produce suggested order quantities.
reorder.idempotency_note: Each run sends an Idempotency-Key; the server does not yet cache duplicate replays (see DIVERGENCES D-4).
